LanguageData.ImproveDesc: Attempt to improve the quality of this building.
LanguageData.ImproveSkillInspireNeeded: Must be skill level {0}, or skill level {1} and inspired
LanguageData.ImproveSkillInspireOrRoleNeeded: Must be skill level {0}, or skill level {1} and inspired and a Production Specialist

LanguageData.ImproveInspireOrRoleNeeded: Must be skill level {0} or inspired or a Production Specialist
